info.title: Classification of Thrombus/Non-Thrombus-LowerLimb
info.subtitle: ThrombUS+ Valid Dataset from ThrombUS+ site (IMAGES+NUMERIC DATASET)
info.description:
# THROMBUS VS NON-THROMBUS DATASET 
DVT is a serious condition that remains common despite advances in prophylaxis. It is a condition that poses a serious health problem due to its morbidity and mortality.
DICOM files are available in the Zenodo Repository:
## References:
#  Training-set:
1)https://zenodo.org/records/17659415
# Testing-set:
2)https://zenodo.org/records/17664207
## For Futher query visit ThrombUS+ website:
3)https://thrombus.eu/index.php/contact/
#
If  you have still any doubt so goto the reference of Article and Google scholars:
Journal link:
4)https://www.umbjournal.org/article/S0301-5629(25)00384-9/abstract
Google-Scholars link:
5)https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=list_works&hl=en&hl=en&user=7sWg_LgAAAAJ&sortby=pubdate
Youtube link:
https://www.youtube.com/@ThrombUS-eu-project/videos
# DATASET PUBLISHER NAME(FRAME_DATASET NOT DICOM):
My name is AbdullahMohsin,currently I am working on DVT Diagnosis earlier with the help of Machine learning.I live in Pakistan,Karachi and currently ,in collecting samples from multiple hospital and doing survey from multiple hospital in Karachi.This dataset is valid ,I have also verified some sample form the hospital and I have even done survey from  the number of hospitals.

# DATASET DETAILS:
I have upload a zip folder which have train and test.Each have individual folder which include frame ,I have not make separate folder for Thrombus and non-Thrombus.It is your job,consider train.csv as reference.I am also uploading test.csv but as reference of ThrombUS+ site ,it is not annotate and it need to be annotated,so I will annotate in future as it have multiple  folder approx(574) test.There are number of train folder ,you can make a split from train ,it will be enough as it is approx(2341)train.
I am doing further research so I have highlighted number of anotomical parts of lower limb ,but here there are 4 parts(Popliteal Vein,Common Femoral Vein, Great Saphenous Vein and Femoral Vein).
I have further done study and find more parameters including(Age,Height,Weight,Thigh Circumference,Limb,Compressibility,Thrombosis/Non-Thrombosis).
# Further detail:
# a)DICOM DATASET:
i)Training:2341->DICOM Dataset    Survey-->Horizon Europe from 594 patients
ii)Testing:594-->DICOM Dataset     Survey-->Horizon Europe from 594 patients
# b) TRAINING DATASET:
i) 2179(93.1%) -> Non-Thrombus
ii) 162 (6.9%) ->Thrombus
# c) Gender:
->NON-THROMBUS:
i) Male (954)->40.8%
ii) Female(1225)->52.3%
-> THROMBUS:
i) Male(82)->3.5%
ii) Female(80)->3.4%
# d)PARAMETERS:
(Filename,SubjectID,Age,Sex,Height,Weight,Thigh Circumference,Limb,Anatomical Site,Compressibility,Thrombus/Non-Thrombus)
# e)Compressibility:
a)0 -> Null no vein compressed
b)1  -> Little bit vein compressed
c)2 -> Full vein compressed
After Dicom -->video------>image conversion -->(total frames in train folder-->3,37,703 )
I will upload the test.csv again ,when I will annotate it as in ThrombUS+ site,they have not annotate it completely.Project of ThrombUS+ end in next year .You can split train folder ,as dataset is more than enough for machine-learning.
I have visited 17 hospitals and 1 welfare(Salayani) to conduct the survey.It is an interesting project for research.Still ,it is in prgress I will complete it..........................
# DAIT
